title: Crusader Atlas — Glossary
description: Glossary of Crusader-era terms, people, events, military orders, and institutions. Includes both hand-authored entries and entries projected from the rulers dataset. Organized by category with optional subgroup subdivisions.

categories.description: Ordered list of glossary categories. The order determines the desktop rail default (first non-empty category is preselected).

subgroup_labels.description: Map from category slug to an ordered object of { subgroup_slug: display_label } pairs. Categories not listed here render as flat lists. Entries with a subcategory whose category has subgroup labels but no matching key fall into an '_other' bucket.

navigation_groups.description: Groupings of categories for navigation UI (e.g. topbar pills). Each group has a label and an ordered list of category keys.

metadata.description: Export metadata block common to all Crusader Atlas data files.

label.description: Human-readable display label for this category.
Display label for this navigation group.

keys.description: Ordered list of category slugs that belong to this group.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. For ruler-projected entries this is the kebab-cased ruler id (e.g. 'baldwin-i'). Used for see_also cross-references and deep-link query parameters.

name.description: Display name of the glossary entry.

category.description: Category slug this entry belongs to. Must match a slug in the top-level categories array.

subcategory.description: Subgroup slug within the category (e.g. 'jerusalem' within 'monarchs', 'chroniclers' within 'people'). Null if the entry is ungrouped or the category has no subgroups.

era.description: Time period or date range as a display string (e.g. '1100-1118', '1187'). Used for chronological sorting in the monarchs, crusades, and battles categories.

also_known_as.description: Alternative names, spellings, or titles for this entry. Searched alongside the primary name.

short.description: One-line summary shown in list views and search results.

body.description: Prose paragraphs for the detail view. Each array element is one paragraph. For ruler-projected entries, sourced from the ruler's bio field.

image_url.description: Image filename (bare, in fortress-pics/) or a remote https:// URL. Null if no image is available.

wikipedia.description: Wikipedia article links for this entry.

en.description: URL of the English Wikipedia article, or null.

he.description: URL of the Hebrew Wikipedia article, or null.

see_also.description: Array of glossary entry ids for cross-reference chips. Broken ids are silently dropped at render time. Ruler-projected entries do not carry see_also.

source.description: 'authored' for hand-written entries in the GLOSSARY array; 'rulers' for entries auto-projected from the RULERS dataset.

ruler_id.description: For ruler-projected entries: the original ruler id from the rulers dataset (e.g. 'baldwin_i'). Null for hand-authored entries.
